subject: fix(security): comprehensive code review audit — 13 fixes across 15 files
body:
Security fixes:
- CSV formula injection: prefix formula-triggering chars with tab (CWE-1236)
- ReDoS: reject nested-quantifier regex patterns, cap input length (CWE-1333)
- Embed postMessage: validate origin, cap max height to prevent UI abuse
- Debug pill: gate behind import.meta.env.DEV to prevent data leak in production
- Embed code: HTML-encode slug to prevent injection in copy-pasted snippets
- Debug report: redact URL query params to avoid leaking tokens/hidden field values

Race condition fixes:
- Auto-save: read definition from store at save-time (not stale closure),
  only clear isDirty if definition unchanged during async save
- ResponsesPage optimistic update: capture pre-update state via functional
  updater to avoid stale closure on concurrent status changes
- All page fetches: add AbortController to prevent state updates after unmount

Memory leak fixes:
- Auto-save: replace unbounded timeout array with single refs per purpose
- Timer cleanup on unmount is now deterministic (2 refs vs N-length array)

Other fixes:
- ID generation: use crypto.randomUUID() instead of Date.now() to prevent
  collisions on rapid operations
- API client: accept optional AbortSignal on all methods
- BuilderPage: add e.returnValue for cross-browser beforeunload compat

Tags: security, race-condition, memory-leak, audit, csv, regex, embed, pwa
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-audit
Semver: patch
